rationale: Educ. Code §49.0044 governs transitional procedures for elderly/disabled homestead exemption elections under S.J.R. 85. It does not reference or depend on the general residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing that amount creates no direct conflict.
quote: TRANSITIONAL PROVISIONS: INCREASED HOMESTEAD EXEMPTIONS FOR ELDERLY OR DISABLED PERSONS.
_note: Rule addresses elderly/disabled exemptions and school district election procedures, not the general §11.13(b) exemption amount. Indirect revenue effects on school districts are fiscal, not a direct statutory conflict.
